source: oldschool.runescape.wiki diary pages + github.com/Zoinkwiz/quest-helper task flag mappings

tasks.task: Have Wizard Cromperty teleport you to the Rune Essence mine.
tasks.note: Note: You can right-click him to teleport.

tasks.task: Steal a cake from the Ardougne market stalls.
Sell Silk to Silk trader in Ardougne for 60 coins each.
tasks.note: Note: You must first offer to sell your silk for 120 coins, then counter his bid with 60 coins. He'll refuse to speak to you if you've just stolen from his silk stall, and his behaviour only resets after you've spent at least ten consecutive minutes outside of Ardougne without logging off.

tasks.task: Use the altar in East Ardougne's church.
tasks.note: Note: Requires you to have less than full Prayer points.

tasks.task: Go out fishing on the Fishing Trawler
tasks.note: Note: You only have to start this minigame, completing it is optional.

tasks.task: Enter the Combat Training Camp north of W. Ardougne.
Have Tindel Marchant identify a Rusted Sword for you.
tasks.note: Note: There is a 1/100 chance the sword turns out to be nothing, in which case you'll have to bring a new one.

tasks.task: Use the Ardougne Lever to teleport to the Wilderness.
tasks.note: Note: You can pull the lever there to return.

tasks.task: View Aleck's Hunter Emporium in Yanille.
Check what pets you have Insured with Probita in Ardougne.
tasks.note: Note: You can right-click her to check.

rewards: Ardougne cloak 1
Antique lamp worth 2,500 experience in any skill of at least level 30
Earn twice as many death runes from trading in cats to civilians in West Ardougne
Drops from Jubsters and Frogeels will be noted in the Creature Creation activity

tasks.task: Enter the Unicorn pen in Ardougne zoo using Fairy rings.

reqs.text: Started Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Dramen or Lunar staff to travel to Fairy ring code BIS.

tasks.task: Grapple over Yanille's south wall.
Harvest some strawberries from the Ardougne farming patch.

reqs.text: 3 strawberry seeds, spade, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake
Basket of apples recommended to pay the nearby farmer to protect the crop

tasks.task: Cast the Ardougne Teleport spell.

reqs.text: Means to cast Ardougne Teleport (2 Water, 2 Law)

tasks.task: Travel to Castlewars by Hot Air Balloon.

reqs.text: If the route has not been unlocked yet, 11 total yew logs are required to unlock it before flying again to Castle Wars to complete this task. Upon unlocking the route, you may use 1 normal log to depart to Taverley before returning to Castle Wars for the task completion.

tasks.task: Claim buckets of sand from Bert in Yanille.
tasks.note: Note: Ultimate Ironmen must instead fill a bucket with sand from Bert's sand pit.

reqs.text: Completion of The Hand in the Sand (unless playing as Ultimate Ironman)

tasks.task: Catch any fish on the Fishing Platform.
Pickpocket the master farmer north of Ardougne.
Collect some Nightshade from the Skavid Caves.
tasks.note: Note: It can be found in the northernmost cave.

reqs.text: Any light source and the Skavid map

tasks.task: Kill a swordchick in the Tower of Life.
Equip Iban's upgraded staff or upgrade an Iban staff.
tasks.note: Note: You can upgrade the staff without equipping it.

reqs.text: Iban's upgraded staff, or 200,000 coins and Iban's staff to have the Dark Mage in West Ardougne upgrade it

tasks.task: Visit the Island East of the Necromancer's tower.

reqs.text: Started Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Dramen or Lunar staff to travel to Fairy ring code AIR

rewards: Ardougne cloak 2
Antique lamp worth 7,500 experience in any skill of at least level 40
Drops from Unicows, Newtroosts, and Spidines will be noted in the Creature Creation activity
Wizard Cromperty offers you 100 noted pure essence for free every day
Ability to change the ring of life teleport location to Ardougne
Chance on receiving additional runes at the Ourania Altar (chance varies per rune)
10% increased chance of successfully pickpocketing within Ardougne
Hold up to 56 coin pouches at a time, up from 28

tasks.task: Recharge some Jewellery at the Totem in the Legends Guild.

reqs.text: Less than fully charged skills necklace or combat bracelet

tasks.task: Enter the Magic Guild.
Steal from a chest in Ardougne Castle.
Have a zookeeper put you in Ardougne Zoo's monkey cage.

reqs.text: Partial completion of the Monkey Madness I quest

tasks.task: Teleport to the Watchtower.

reqs.text: Means to cast the Watchtower teleport (2 Earth, 2 Law)

tasks.task: Catch a Red Salamander.
Check the health of a Palm tree near tree gnome village.
tasks.note: Note: This is the farming patch next to Gileth.

reqs.text: Palm sapling, spade and a rake
15 Papaya fruit recommended to pay the gardener

tasks.task: Pick some Poison Ivy berries from the patch south of Ardougne.
tasks.note: Note: This patch is located next to the Ardougne Monastery.

reqs.text: Poison ivy seed, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake

tasks.task: Smith a Mithril platebody near Ardougne.
tasks.note: Note: You'll have to use the Port Khazard, Yanille, or West Ardougne anvil for this.

tasks.task: Enter your POH from Yanille.

reqs.text: 25,000 coins for an estate agent to move your house to Yanille

tasks.task: Smith a Dragon sq shield in West Ardougne.

reqs.text: Shield left half, shield right half and a hammer

tasks.task: Craft some Death runes from Essence.
tasks.note: Note: Entering the Death Altar from the Mourner Headquarters is not recommended after the quest. It follows a lengthy route that requires the crystal trinket and a death talisman/tiara or catalytic talisman/tiara, and (if Song of the Elves has not been completed) mourner gear and the new key. It's even possible to lock yourself out of this entrance with the light puzzle, which may require you to enter it via the Abyss or through the Underground Pass anyway to change the rotation of the mirrors again.

reqs.text: Completion of Mourning's End Part II
Note: Crafting runes using Guardian essence will NOT complete this achievement
Access to the Death Altar via the Abyss

rewards: Ardougne cloak 3
Antique lamp worth 15,000 experience in any skill of at least level 50
Wizard Cromperty offers you 150 noted pure essence for free every day
Watchtower Teleport can now be used to teleport to Yanille instead
10% increased chance of successfully pickpocketing anywhere around Gielinor
Hold up to 84 coin pouches at a time, up from 56

tasks.task: Catch a Manta ray in the Fishing Trawler and cook it in Port Khazard.
tasks.note: Note: Completing or updating any other task in-between these steps will reset the progress for this task.

reqs.text: Raw manta ray, multiple recommended in case of burning one

tasks.task: Picklock the door to the basement of Yanille Agility Dungeon.
Pickpocket a Hero.
Make a rune crossbow yourself from scratch within Witchaven or Yanille.
tasks.note: Note: You must use the spinning wheel in Witchaven to make the crossbow string and the anvil in Yanille to make the runite limbs. Fletching the yew stock and completing the rune crossbow can be done in either settlement. Completing or updating any other task in-between these steps will reset the progress for this task.

reqs.text: Yew logs, runite bar, hammer, knife, and sinew or a tree root

tasks.task: Imbue a Salve amulet at Nightmare Zone, or equip a Salve amulet that was imbued there.
tasks.note: Note: You cannot use a Scroll of imbuing from Emir's Arena or use Zeal Tokens from Soul Wars.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1356917400210448389|date=3 February 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/100999|archivedate=5 February 2021|quote=Yes. Seems to be the case for everything that can be imbued in the two different places - rings, amulets, etc. I suspect that was to stop people getting the imbue in one place, then trying to refund it in the other place.}} In Deadman Mode, the task is "Attempt to equip an imbued Salve amulet at the Nightmare Zone plinth." NOTE: Whilst the text reads imbued, you must wear a Salve (ei) not Salve (i)

reqs.text: Salve amulet(i) or Salve amulet(ei), or 800,000 Nightmare Zone points points to imbue the normal one (reduced to 400,000 points with the hard tier of the Combat Achievements completed)

tasks.task: Pick some Torstol from the patch north of Ardougne.

reqs.text: Torstol seed, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake

tasks.task: Complete a lap of Ardougne's rooftop agility course.
Cast Ice Barrage on another player within Castle Wars.
tasks.note: Note: You have to successfully hit the player, so multiple casts are recommended. In Deadman Mode, the task is "Visit the Castle Wars lobby with at least 94 Magic after completing Desert Treasure I."

reqs.text: Means to cast Ice Barrage (4 Death, 2 Blood, 6 Water or a Blighted ancient ice sack for every cast)

rewards: Ardougne cloak 4
Antique lamp worth 50,000 experience in any skill of at least level 70
Bert automatically delivers 84 buckets of sand to your bank each day you log in, unless asked to stop. (Ultimate Ironmen are ineligible)
Wizard Cromperty offers you 250 noted pure essence for free every day
50% more fish from Fishing Trawler
25% more marks of grace from the Ardougne Rooftop Course
Hold up to 140 coin pouches at a time, up from 84

tasks.task: Catch a Golden Warbler.

reqs.text: Necklace of passage recommended for quick access to Eagle's Eyrie, near the Uzer Hunter area

tasks.task: Mine 5 clay in the north-eastern desert.

reqs.text: Necklace of passage recommended for quick access to Eagle's Eyrie, near the Uzer mine

tasks.task: Enter the Kalphite Hive.
Enter the Desert with a set of Desert robes equipped.
tasks.note: Note: Not to be confused with the desert outfit, which doesn't count for this task. You also cannot use the black desert shirt or black desert robe.

reqs.text: Desert shirt, desert robe, and desert boots

tasks.task: Kill a Vulture
tasks.note: Note: These are found north of Menaphos or Sophanem.

tasks.task: Have the Nardah Herbalist clean a Herb for you.
tasks.note: Note: You have to talk to Zahur to complete this task. Do not use the grimy herb on her to clean it.

tasks.task: Collect 5 Potato Cactus from the Kalphite Hive.
tasks.note: Note: You can bring a single potato cactus to the lair, then drop and pick it up five times.

reqs.text: Antipoison and food recommended if not bringing your own potato cactus

tasks.task: Sell some artefacts to Simon Templeton.
tasks.note: Note: The pyramid top from the nearby Agility Pyramid does not count.

reqs.text: Players must have started Icthlarin's Little Helper for access to Sophanem.

tasks.task: Open the Sarcophagus in the first room of Pyramid Plunder
Cut a desert cactus open to fill a waterskin.

reqs.text: Knife or a slash weapon, and an empty waterskin

tasks.task: Travel from the Shantay Pass to Pollnivneach by Magic Carpet.

reqs.text: 200 coins and a Shantay Pass or another 5 coins.

rewards: Desert amulet 1
Antique lamp worth 2,500 experience in any skill of at least level 30
Pharaoh's sceptre will now hold up to 10 charges, up from 3
Desert goat horns from goats are now noted
Simon Templeton now also buys artefacts in noted form

tasks.task: Climb to the summit of the Agility Pyramid.
Slay a desert lizard.
Catch an Orange Salamander.

reqs.text: Rope and a small fishing net

tasks.task: Steal a feather from the Desert Phoenix.
Travel to Uzer via Magic Carpet.

reqs.text: 200 coins (or 205 coins if using the Shantay Pass)

tasks.task: Travel to the Desert via Eagle.
tasks.note: Note: You'll unlock travel from the Eagles' Peak Dungeon after the required quest.

tasks.task: Pray at the Elidinis statuette in Nardah
tasks.note: Note: Requires you to have less than full Prayer points.

reqs.text: Completion of Spirits of the Elid

tasks.task: Create a combat potion in the desert.

reqs.text: Harralander potion (unf) and goat horn dust

tasks.task: Teleport to Enakhra's Temple with the Camulet.
Visit the Genie.
tasks.note: Note: This task is automatically completed during Spirits of the Elid.

tasks.task: Teleport to Pollnivneach with a redirected teleport to house tablet.

tasks.task: Knock out and pickpocket a Menaphite Thug.
Mine some Granite.

tasks.task: Kill the Kalphite Queen.
Complete a lap of the Pollnivneach agility course.
Slay a Dust Devil in the desert cave with a Slayer helmet equipped.

reqs.text: Slayer helmet (requires 55 Crafting ) (and completion of Cabin Fever for Ironman accounts)

tasks.task: Activate Ancient Magicks at the altar in the Jaldraocht Pyramid.
Defeat a Locust Rider with Keris.
tasks.note: Note: This weapon only has to be equipped as it dies, allowing you to deal damage with other weapons. Keris partisan and its variants also work for completing this task.

reqs.text: Keris or Keris partisan, and any light source

tasks.task: Burn some yew logs on the Nardah Mayor's balcony.
tasks.note: Note: He lives directly east of the central fountain.

tasks.task: Create a Mithril Platebody in Nardah.
tasks.note: Note: The anvil is found in the westernmost building.

Free carpet rides throughout the Kharidian Desert, down from a fee of 75-200 coins per ride

Cast Ice Barrage against a foe in the Desert

tasks.task: Fletch some Dragon darts at the Bedabin Camp.
Speak to the KQ head in your POH.

Kq head or Kq head (tattered), and 50,000 coins to have the taxidermist stuff it
